title: Turnkey 132kV Substation Deployment
scope: Design, engineering, supply, testing, and commissioning of a turnkey 132kV industrial substation, including power transformers, custom HT control panels, outdoor switchyards, and lightning protection systems.
challenges: The site was located in a coastal region with high saline atmospheric corrosion. Cable paths had to be rerouted under critical groundwater levels without structural seepage.
solutions: Utilized hot-dip galvanized structural steel towers and high-grade IP65 SS316 control cabinets. Installed advanced polyurethane water-tight cable sealing blocks at all gland entry plates.
results: Substation successfully charged 30 days ahead of schedule, enabling the factory's new production block to commence operations smoothly.

title: Automated Automotive Manufacturing Grid
scope: Installation of complex Motor Control Centers (MCC), dual-input PLC synchronization switchboards, automated SCADA software integration, and copper busbar routing across paint shop and assembly line motors.
challenges: Continuous automated assembly lines had zero tolerance for power interruptions. Grid modifications had to be performed during scheduled 48-hour weekend line shutdowns.
solutions: Pre-fabricated all MCC drawers and busbar runs offsite. Performed extensive pre-delivery FAT checks at our facility, enabling on-site plug-and-play assembly.
results: Zero shutdown extension. The paint shop line automation achieved a 99.8% energy-efficiency index through smart PLC coordination.

title: Medical Facility Power Redundancy Grid
scope: Engineering and commissioning of automatic transfer AMF panels, clean-line medical isolation panels, and a low-impedance chemical grounding grid for critical life support surgical suites.
challenges: Ventilator units and MRI equipment require continuous current supply. Transition lag between mains power failure and generator backup had to be restricted below 8 seconds.
solutions: Configured dual-motorized changeover circuit breakers controlled by high-speed Deep Sea PLC logic. Installed chemical copper-bonded electrodes maintaining ground impedance at 0.7 Ohms.
results: Tested grid switchover transition is accomplished in 5.4 seconds. Grounding profiles completely filter transient noise, ensuring high-fidelity operation of MRI scanners.
